Description
com.github.copilot
Core classes for the GitHub Copilot SDK for Java.
com.github.copilot.generated
 
com.github.copilot.rpc
Configuration classes and data transfer objects for the Copilot SDK.

  • Uses of SessionEvent in com.github.copilot.rpc

    Methods in com.github.copilot.rpc that return types with arguments of type SessionEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Consumer<SessionEvent>
    ResumeSessionConfig.getOnEvent()
    Gets the event handler registered before the session.resume RPC is issued.
    Consumer<SessionEvent>
    SessionConfig.getOnEvent()
    Gets the event handler registered before the session.create RPC is issued.
    Method parameters in com.github.copilot.rpc with type arguments of type SessionEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ResumeSessionConfig
    ResumeSessionConfig.setOnEvent(Consumer<SessionEvent> onEvent)
    Sets an event handler that is registered on the session before the session.resume RPC is issued.
    SessionConfig
    SessionConfig.setOnEvent(Consumer<SessionEvent> onEvent)
    Sets an event handler that is registered on the session before the session.create RPC is issued.
